title: Poisson Steve
description: A funny mod which adds Poisson Steve to minecraft
body:
**Poisson Steve :**

---

**This mod uses the character Poisson Steve whichs was made by Vigzvigz and the song Poisson Steve which was mad by Tomo. I claim no ownership of those elements which can be found on youtube.**

---

**Content:**

The mod adds Poisson Steve to minecraft
![Poisson Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c52ca50d28d8e20c2a26f3fc95a3e08c6baa89.png)
He can be found in the new Fish tank structure all over the overworld and can be tamed using kelp.
Once tamed, he will follow his owner around unless right clicked in which case he will sit down and wait.
By right clicking Poisson Steve with a costume (crafted with 4 leather and one gold), his appearance will change randomly to one of **13** different costumes (including base one).
Finally, when music is played, Poisson Steve will dance

The mod also adds, as mentionned previously, a fish tank structure and a costume item. With that is added a music disc which plays the poisson steve song.
